description:
A feature-rich College Management System built using React.js and Express.js.
This project is designed for academic use, real-world learning, and full-stack skill enhancement.

A File Sharing System built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with Cloudinary integration for handling file URLs. This project is part of my practice and learning, selected from the college project list.

SmartPark is a full-stack MERN-based parking management system designed to solve real-world urban parking challenges. It provides real-time parking slot availability, smart booking, and a powerful admin dashboard with a clean and responsive user experience.

EduFlow AI is an AI-powered student assistant platform designed to help students manage their academic life in a smarter, more organized, and productive way. It combines multiple student-focused tools into a single platform, including an AI doubt solver, study planner, AI notes generator, productivity tracker, mood tracker, reminders, streak system, PDF export functionality, and shareable notes.The project aims to reduce the stress of managing studies by providing students with tools that improve planning, consistency, and learning efficiency. Instead of using multiple applications for different academic needs, students can access everything from one centralized platform. EduFlow AI focuses on creating a seamless and user-friendly experience that supports students throughout their learning journey.Built with modern web technologies and AI integration, the project also encourages open-source collaboration. Contributors are welcome to help improve existing features, fix issues, introduce new ideas, and enhance the overall experience for students using the platform.
